title: cynometra novoguineensis
intro: Cynometra novoguineensis, also known as the New Guinea ironwood, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cynometra novoguineensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
